---
title: "Unit 4: Statistics"
number-sections: true
number-depth: 2
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
#| output: false
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '../unit4-Statistics')
from Statistics import generate
from collections import defaultdict

# LT1 drill exercises: count=4 (4 parts per exercise)
sec_averages = generate(
    types=[
        "mean_simple","median_simple","mode_simple","range_simple",
        "averages_combined","mean_find_missing",
    ],
    seed=10, show_solutions=True, count=4,
)
# Stem & leaf: 3 separate exercises, each with own diagram + 3 parts
sec_stemleaf = generate(
    types=["stem_leaf_averages","stem_leaf_averages","stem_leaf_averages"],
    seed=11, show_solutions=True, count=1,
)
# Merge into one list
sec_averages["exercises"] = sec_averages["exercises"] + sec_stemleaf["exercises"]

sec_freq = generate(
    types=[
        "freq_table_mean","freq_table_median","freq_table_mode",
        "freq_table_full","freq_table_median_find_x",
    ],
    seed=20, show_solutions=True, count=4,
)

sec_grouped = generate(
    types=[
        "grouped_mean","grouped_modal_class","grouped_median_class",
        "grouped_full","grouped_combined_mean","grouped_find_missing_freq",
    ],
    seed=30, show_solutions=True, count=4,
)

sec_cumfreq = generate(
    types=[
        "cumfreq_table","cumfreq_read","cumfreq_iqr",
        "cumfreq_above_value","cumfreq_find_ab","cumfreq_full",
    ],
    seed=40, show_solutions=True, count=1,
)

sec_boxplot = generate(
    types=[
        "boxplot_iqr","boxplot_draw","boxplot_outlier",
        "boxplot_find_unknowns","boxplot_read",
    ],
    seed=50, show_solutions=True, count=1,
)

def by_diff(exercises):
    g = defaultdict(list)
    for ex in exercises:
        g[ex["meta"]["difficulty"]].append(ex)
    return g

gavg  = by_diff(sec_averages["exercises"])
gfreq = by_diff(sec_freq["exercises"])
ggrp  = by_diff(sec_grouped["exercises"])
gcf   = by_diff(sec_cumfreq["exercises"])
gbp   = by_diff(sec_boxplot["exercises"])

# ── Render helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────
def render_part_q(p):
    if p.get("is_wide") or p.get("is_word"):
        return f"\n{p['label']})\n\n$${p['question_latex']}$$\n"
    return f"\n{p['label']})  ${p['question_latex']}$\n"

def render_part_a(p):
    ans = p["answer_latex"]
    sol = p.get("solution_latex", "")
    wide = p.get("is_wide") or p.get("is_word")
    if wide:
        out = f"\n**{p['label']})** $${ans}$$\n"
    else:
        out = f"\n**{p['label']})** ${ans}$\n"
    if sol:
        out += f"\n$$\\quad {sol}$$\n"
    return out

def _html_svg(svg, margin="12px 0 8px"):
    print("```{=html}")
    print(f'<div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;margin:{margin};">')
    print(svg)
    print('</div>')
    print("```\n")

def _math_table(tbl):
    """Render a LaTeX array table correctly — as raw HTML math block."""
    print("```{=html}")
    print('<div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;margin:10px 0 6px;">')
    print(f'<span class="math display">\\[{tbl}\\]</span>')
    print('</div>')
    print("```\n")

def render_exercises(exercises, prefix):
    for ex in exercises:
        print(f"::::: {{#exr-{prefix}-{ex['number']}}}\n")
        print(f"### {ex['title']}\n")
        print(f"{ex['instruction']}\n")

        ex_type = ex["meta"].get("type","")

        # ── Shared table shown ONCE above all parts ──
        # Uses raw HTML math so \renewcommand renders correctly
        if ex.get("ex_tbl"):
            _math_table(ex["ex_tbl"])

        # ── Exercise-level SVG ──
        # stem & leaf: above parts
        # boxplot_read: above parts (students read from it)
        # cumfreq: after parts (students use curve to answer)
        if ex.get("ex_svg") and ex_type in ("stem_leaf_averages", "boxplot_read"):
            _html_svg(ex["ex_svg"])

        # ── Parts ──
        for p in ex["parts"]:
            print(render_part_q(p))
            if p.get("svg"):
                _html_svg(p["svg"], "4px 0 10px")
            print()

        # ── CF curve shown AFTER all parts ──
        if ex.get("ex_svg") and ex_type in (
                "cumfreq_iqr", "cumfreq_table", "cumfreq_full"):
            _html_svg(ex["ex_svg"], "16px 0 8px")

        # ── Solution ──
        print('\n::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}')
        print("## 🔍 View Solution\n")
        for p in ex["parts"]:
            print(render_part_a(p))
            if p.get("sol_svg"):
                _html_svg(p["sol_svg"], "6px 0 12px")
        print(":::")
        print("::: exercise-meta")
        print('<div class="skill-container">')
        for skill in ex["meta"]["skills"]:
            print(f'  <span class="skill-badge">{skill}</span>')
        print('</div>')
        print(":::")
        print(":::::\n")
```

## 🎯 Learning Targets

{{< include Statistics-Learning-Targets.qmd >}}

---

## 🗂️ Formula Cards

{{< include Statistics-Formulas.qmd >}}

---

## 📊 Part A — Averages and Range {#sec-averages}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## 🔑 Key Formulas

$$\bar{x} = \frac{\sum x}{n} \qquad \text{Median} = \text{middle value (sorted)} \qquad \text{Range} = \text{max} - \text{min}$$
:::

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### 🟢 Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gavg.get("easy",[]), "avg")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🟡 Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gavg.get("medium",[]), "avg")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🔴 Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gavg.get("hard",[]), "avg")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

::::::::::

---

## 📋 Part B — Frequency Tables {#sec-freq}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## 🔑 Key Formula

$$\bar{x} = \frac{\sum fx}{\sum f}$$
:::

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### 🟢 Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gfreq.get("easy",[]), "freq")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🟡 Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gfreq.get("medium",[]), "freq")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🔴 Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gfreq.get("hard",[]), "freq")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

::::::::::

---

## 📦 Part C — Grouped Frequency Tables {#sec-grouped}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## 🔑 Key Points

Use the **midpoint** of each class interval for estimated mean: $\bar{x} \approx \dfrac{\sum fx}{\sum f}$

**Modal class** = class with highest frequency. **Median class** = class containing the $\frac{n}{2}$th value.
:::

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### 🟢 Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(ggrp.get("easy",[]), "grp")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🟡 Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(ggrp.get("medium",[]), "grp")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🔴 Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(ggrp.get("hard",[]), "grp")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

::::::::::

---

## 📈 Part D — Cumulative Frequency {#sec-cumfreq}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## 🔑 Key Points

| Measure | Position on CF axis |
|---------|-------------------|
| Median ($Q_2$) | $\frac{n}{2}$ |
| Lower quartile ($Q_1$) | $\frac{n}{4}$ |
| Upper quartile ($Q_3$) | $\frac{3n}{4}$ |

$\text{IQR} = Q_3 - Q_1$
:::

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### 🟢 Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gcf.get("easy",[]), "cf")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🟡 Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gcf.get("medium",[]), "cf")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🔴 Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gcf.get("hard",[]), "cf")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

::::::::::

---

## 🎯 Part E — Box Plots and IQR {#sec-boxplot}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## 🔑 Key Points

$$\text{IQR} = Q_3 - Q_1$$

**Outlier rule:** A value is an outlier if it is $> Q_3 + 1.5 \times \text{IQR}$ or $< Q_1 - 1.5 \times \text{IQR}$
:::

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### 🟢 Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gbp.get("easy",[]), "bp")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🟡 Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gbp.get("medium",[]), "bp")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🔴 Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gbp.get("hard",[]), "bp")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

::::::::::

---

## ⚡ Test Your Knowledge {#sec-worksheet}

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../assets/worksheet.css">

<script src="../../assets/worksheet.js"></script>

<div class="ws-toolbar no-print">
  <div class="ws-controls">
    <button class="ws-btn primary" id="btn-ws-new" onclick="wsGenerate()" disabled>🔄 New Session</button>
    <button class="ws-btn outline" onclick="wsOpenPreview()">👁️ Preview & Print</button>
    <a href="https://app.flintk12.com/activities/statistics-mast-8f4ceb/sessions/new" target="_blank" class="ws-btn flint">🤖 Get Help</a>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-loading" class="ws-status">⏳ Loading Python...</div>
</div>

<div id="ws-container"></div>

<div id="ws-preview-overlay" class="ws-modal no-print">
  <div class="ws-modal-header">
    <span id="ws-preview-title-text">Worksheet Preview</span>
    <div class="ws-modal-btns">
      <button class="ws-btn-small print" onclick="wsPrint()">🖨️ Print PDF</button>
      <button class="ws-btn-small close" onclick="wsClosePreview()">✕ Close</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-preview-scroll" class="ws-modal-body"></div>
</div>


<script>
window.WS_CONFIG = {
  title:    "Unit 4: Statistics",
  unit:     "Unit 4 · Statistics",
  pyPath:   "Statistics.py",
  template: "word",
  count:    4,
  types: [
    "mean_simple",
    "median_simple",
    "averages_combined",
    "mean_find_missing",
    "freq_table_mean",
    "freq_table_median",
    "grouped_mean",
    "grouped_modal_class",
    "cumfreq_table",
    "cumfreq_read",
    "boxplot_iqr",
    "boxplot_draw"
  ]
};
</script>
```
